gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用笑声包裹的思念，在语音留言里开出跨越生死的浪漫之花。
gems.whyWatchEn: A bittersweet romance where grief meets humor through misdirected voicemails, proving love can transcend even the final goodbye.
gems.audience: 喜欢温暖催泪、不落俗套爱情故事的观众；能接受慢节奏情感沉淀的文艺片爱好者。
gems.audienceEn: Viewers who enjoy heartfelt, tear-jerking romance with a twist; fans of slow-burn emotional indie films.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 当数字原住民遭遇塑料友情，老玩具们用童心对抗算法统治。
gems.whyWatchEn: A clever meta-commentary on screen addiction disguised as a family adventure, where classic toys fight for a child's soul against smart devices.
gems.audience: 带孩子观影的家长（尤其关注屏幕时间管理）；皮克斯老粉及玩具系列忠实观众。
gems.audienceEn: Parents concerned about screen time (great family discussion starter); die-hard Toy Story fans.
